title: Voice Integration for Chat Application
description: Request to integrate voice capabilities into an existing chat-based application to enhance user interaction.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Voice Integration for Chat Application (DEM-2026-0097)

Executive Summary  
This project proposes adding voice capabilities to an existing chat application to improve user engagement and interaction. Enhancing communication modalities aims to create a more intuitive and accessible user experience.

Business Value/Impact  
Integrating voice features will increase customer satisfaction and retention by offering a convenient alternative to text communication. It supports competitive differentiation and broadens the application's appeal to a wider user base.

Risk Mitigation  
To address medium risk factors, the project will implement phased testing and user feedback loops. Security and privacy concerns will be managed through strict compliance with relevant data protection standards.
